response.overview: # Translation  The story tells of a girl named Aina Cempaka who was a victim of sexual assault five years ago, as a result of her brother's failure to settle a debt with Black, a nightclub owner. Because of this incident, Aina Cempaka became depressed for months. She ran to a bridge to vent her frustration but fell below and crashed onto a rock surface. Aina Cempaka's disappearance led to rumors that she had committed suicide and died. Without anyone's knowledge, Aina Cempaka was actually in a coma and had a miscarriage. She also lost all her memories. After the incident, Aina Cempaka went to Kuala Lumpur to start a new life and lived with Suzy. She also accepted an offer to work at Ibunda Corporation as the personal assistant to Faiz Iqbal. Since then, Faiz Iqbal's work has become increasingly organized, making him more enthusiastic about going to the office.
response.title: Tiada Maaf Buatmu
